activities.title: Vision Board Squad Activity
materials: Poster boards or digital canvas link
instructions: Each member shares a 2-minute personal why story.
Collaboratively build a squad vision board: images, words, and symbols representing your shared venture thesis.
Capture three measurable goals for Week 1 on the board footer.
outputs: Photo or export of squad vision board
Three Week 1 goals listed in squad charter
debriefQuestions: Where did squad visions align or diverge?
Which goal is most challenging for your squad this week?
How does this connect to Business Plan Chapter 1?

activities.title: Research Squad Charter & Role Assignment
materials: Squad charter template (worksheet or digital form)
Role description handout: Lead, Scribe, Presenter, Analyst
instructions: Assign squad roles for Week 1 rotation.
Document meeting cadence and communication channel.
List accountability norms and how conflicts will be resolved.
Faculty coach signs off on charter before break.
debriefQuestions: What norm will keep your squad effective under time pressure?
Who will present squad outputs at the Vision Review gate?
